column1: # sheet.format.locale.* — Western-European Latin tier rendering goldens
# (fr-FR / es-ES / it-IT). Spec §9; ECMA-376 §18.8.31. Driven through
# format CODE is locale-NEUTRAL (same `#,##0.00` / `mmmm` / `AM/PM` tokens as
# the en/de goldens); only the RENDERED separators, month/day names, and AM/PM
# strings differ. The en-US goldens (number/datetime.golden.tsv) and the de
# golden MUST stay byte-identical — this file is an additive mirror, never a
# This file is a pure data-table expansion: each locale row exercises the same
# table-read rendering path (number.rs / datetime.rs read separators + names
# from sheet-format/src/locale.rs) the en/de rows already cover. No new
# rendering code — only new LocaleData const rows.
